full_text:
Wang Jia 王嘉
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wang Jia (王嘉)was born in Zuopingyi commandery. Corrupt and insulted Ji Mao as being incompetent. Wang Jia was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
